    MissionTypes:O0nluMgQm06rO06tdoTKbA

    labelNew Lifeform: Part 14 (0-0)
    titleNew Lifeform: Part 14
    majorTypestatic
    descriptionBring the shocked and the somewhat dilerious Krux back to Fexucius in Sarkinon.
    maxLvl0
    keyO0nluMgQm06rO06tdoTKbA
    tableMissionTypes
    mustBeInorderYes
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionKrux: “Thank you for taking me home again, I remember everything now, but the sponge controlled every action I took. I think it had a very sofisticated mind, but it was very angry and it was hard to make sense of it all. But I’m glad you helped me get out of there in time, I wasn’t prepare to live the rest of my life as a sponge just yet.“
    addedBodies["9FuUn42bJ0aJ3hLwFw4Vqg"]
